title: Fanta
body:
Adds Fanta to minecraft.

 This makes the game more fun.

Items.

Empty can - can be filled with fanta when sourounded with sugar

Fanta Can when drank gives speed

 

Fluids.

Pure fanta - a placeable fanta

 

Paintings.

Fanta ad 1 - a fanta ad

fanta ad 2 - another fanta ad

 

Trades.

Fanta trade - 32 sugar and 32 diamonds for 64 fanta cans
